tools.name: gas_get_current_price
tools.description:
Use this when you need current gas prices before submitting a transaction. Returns gas tiers and USD cost estimates in JSON.

1. slow: gas price in gwei for slow confirmation (~5 min)
2. standard: gas price in gwei for standard confirmation (~2 min)
3. fast: gas price in gwei for fast confirmation (

tools.name: gas_get_current_price
tools.description:
Use this when you need current gas prices before submitting a transaction. Returns gas tiers and USD cost estimates in JSON. POST variant of gas_get_current_price -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. slow: gas price in gwei for slow confirmation (~5 min)
2. standard: gas p

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: gas_get_current_price · Private data: gas_get_current_price, gas_get_current_price · Public sink: gas_get_current_price.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: gas_get_current_price · Private data: gas_get_current_price, gas_get_current_price · Public sink: gas_get_current_price

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "gas_get_current_price" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "Use this when you need current gas prices before submitting a transaction. Returns gas tiers and USD cost estimates in JSON.

1. slow: gas price in gwei for slow confirmation (~5 min)
2. standard: gas price in gwei for standard confirmation (~2 min)
3. fast: gas price in gwei for fast confirmation (" → after: "Use this when you need current gas prices before submitting a transaction. Returns gas tiers and USD cost estimates in JSON. POST variant of gas_get_current_price -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. slow: gas price in gwei for slow confirmation (~5 min)
2. standard: gas p"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
